source.anonymization: entities mapped to role placeholders; no hostnames/IPs/PII

title: CDN origin cache stampede after TTL drop
loud_symptom: Origin tier 5xx error rate spikes; on-call sees origin CPU saturation and pages the origin team
why_misleading: Origin saturation looks like the cause, but origin is healthy in isolation — the real driver is a config change that collapsed edge cache TTL, sending a read stampede to origin
causal_chain: edge cache TTL config dropped from 300s to 0 in a routine push
loud alert fires on origin, not on the edge config change

canonical_fix.ordering_notes: Restore edge cache TTL FIRST; do not scale origin (masks root cause and burns budget).

notes: Illustrative record demonstrating the ingest contract; NOT real Snorkel data.
